script.summary: A script to check the XML files in this repository for XML well-formedness, counting Chinese characters and English words in XML files, generating a summary report.
script.usage: python projectdir/_scripts/check_xml.py [path] [path] can be a directory or a single XML file. If [path] is omitted, the script will check all XML files in the repository.
script.example: python projectdir/_scripts/check_xml.py python projectdir/_scripts/check_xml.py faiths python projectdir/_scripts/check_xml.py faiths/faran.xml

script.summary: A script to package all the XML document files into a single XML file, which can be used for distribution purposes. The script will resolve all XInclude references and generate a single XML file containing all the XML textual content of the repository. Additional files still need to be included manually, such as images and other non-XML files.
script.usage: python projectdir/_scripts/package.py [output_file] [output_file] is the name of the output XML file. If omitted, the default name is "rakia-verse-package.xml".
